sensitivity: 0.977 (worst-case scenario, 95% CI 0.954-0.989) to 0.987 (best-case scenario, 95% CI 0.967-0.995) for any suspicious findings
specificity: 0.963 (worst-case scenario, 95% CI 0.944-0.976) to 0.977 (best-case scenario, 95% CI 0.961-0.987) for any suspicious findings
auc: 0.974 (95% CI 0.957-0.990) in aided reader study for detection of any suspicious radiographic finding
intended_use: Fetal EchoScan is a machine learning-based computer-assisted diagnosis (CADx) software device indicated as an adjunct to fetal heart ultrasound examination in pregnant women aged 18 or older undergoin
intended_use_full: Fetal EchoScan is a machine learning-based computer-assisted diagnosis (CADx) software device indicated as an adjunct to fetal heart ultrasound examination in pregnant women aged 18 or older undergoing second-trimester anatomic ultrasound exams. When utilized by an interpreting physician, Fetal EchoScan provides information regarding the presence of any of the following suspicious radiographic findings: overriding artery, septal defect at the cardiac crux, abnormal relationship of the outflow tracts, enlarged cardiothoracic ratio, right ventricular to left ventricular size discrepancy, tricuspid valve to mitral valve annular size discrepancy, pulmonary valve to aortic valve annular size discrepancy, cardiac axis deviation.
target_condition: Fetal congenital heart defects and related morphological cardiac abnormalities
ground_truth: Reference standard derived through truthing process in which three pediatric cardiologists independently assessed presence or absence of each finding, with majority voting used to establish ground truth
other_metrics: Device had conclusive output for 98.8% (95% CI 97.8-99.3) of exams. Reader study showed aided reading ROC AUC significantly higher than unaided: 0.974 vs 0.825 (p=0.002), +14.9% increase in AUC. Mean sensitivity aided vs unaided: 0.935 vs 0.782 (+15.3% increase). Mean specificity aided vs unaided: 0.970 vs 0.759 (+21.1% increase). Per-finding sensitivity and specificity ranged from 0.869-0.995 and 0.989-1.000 respectively.
